notes: Solid, complete breakout implementation with proper collision detection, multi-state management, and angle-based paddle reflection, but lacks visual polish (no gradients/highlights on bricks, square ball) and the brick layout has a minor gap issue with the score UI overlapping the top brick row.

An excellent and highly functional Breakout clone with robust collision detection, though it lacks delta-time for movement (making it run too fast on high refresh rate monitors) and the brick grid is slightly off-center.
A solid and mostly complete Breakout clone, but it lacks polish such as frame-independent motion and more robust collision handling, so it falls short of a top score.
